Title: ASP.NET Community Standup: Combining API Versioning with OpenAPI
Description:
Join us for a chat with Chris Martinez and Sander ten Brinke on how ASP.NET API Versioning works with the new ASP.NET Core OpenAPI packages in .NET 10 to generate clean, aligned OpenAPI documents for Minimal APIs and controllers, without duplicated configuration or custom plumbing.

🔗 Links: https://www.theurlist.com/aspnet-standup-20260421

🎙️ Featuring: Daniel Roth, Mike Kistler, Chris Martinez, Sander ten Brinke

#dotnet #aspnetcore
